Privacy Policy and termsVersion: March 2nd, 2021This document applies to the apps "Find Awesome Games", "Hot Apps", "Price Drop App", and "AppBrain App Market".PRIVACYOPT-INOur apps have an opt-in screen at the start. If you don't opt-in, we won't collectany information about installed apps on your device and recommendations won't work.

DATA COLLECTEDWhen you opt in, our app will collect the package name of apps you install and uninstall. Thisdata is sent to AppTornado servers over a secure connection. With the data in the request we canalso see your IP address. We also collect non-personal data, such as the country you're most likely in,what kind of Android device you are using and what OS version is on it and other technical details.When you load the "recommended apps", our app will send a list of all currently installed package names
on your device to retrieve the apps that you most likely will be interested in.

DATA RETENTIONThe installed app data is deleted after at most 30 days. It's processed only for the purpose creating aggregated reports for popularity of apps and analyzing user behavior to improve our products. No personal profiles are built.
